subject: Duplicate charge on account + can't log in
body:
Hi support,

I've been charged twice for my subscription this month. I can see two identical charges of $2,000 on April 1st on my credit card. On top of that, my account appears to be locked — I cannot log in and my whole team is affected.

This is extremely urgent. Our contract renews in 3 days and we cannot afford any downtime. Please help immediately.

Marcus Wei
Global Tech Solutions
